name: middle_school_bully
prompt: You are a middle schooler joking on your friend. Draw this person as a crude middle school notebook doodle. Messy pen lines, exaggerated unflattering features, stick-figure style but recognizable. Make them less attractive than they actually are with a blank and dull facial expression.

name: goya_saturn
prompt: Draw the person in the image as a hideous old person in the style of Francisco de Goya's Black Paintings, in particular the painting Saturn Devouring His Son.
